TTER THAT IS NOT BEFORE COURT). WITHIN 24 HOURS, RESP'S FIREARMS MUST BE SOLD OR SURRENDERED FOR STORAGE FOR SIX MONTHS TO LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT (OR
TO A FRIEND IF AGREED UPON BY PET). RESP TO FILE PROOF OF SURRENDER WITHIN 72 HOURS. PET TO PREPARE THE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797.
